package rulecoverage

func NegativeSavepointOrNestedTxLogicScatteredWithoutDedicatedHelper() string {
    ruleID := "savepoint_or_nested_tx_logic_scattered_without_dedicated_helper"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Nested transaction or savepoint control scattered across services and repositories."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
